name: Ahmed Al-Fahad
comment: Kodai Global Exports supplies high-quality sago and tapioca starch in both food and industrial grades. Secure packaging and on-time delivery make them a reliable supplier.

name: Thabo Mokoena
comment: Kodai Global Exports delivers consistent-quality sago and tapioca starch. Their food and industrial grade products are handled with a professional export process.

comment: Kodai Global Exports offers food and industrial grade starch with consistent quality and competitive pricing. Shipments arrive well-packed and ready for distribution.

name: Nur Aisyah Rahman
comment: Kodai Global Exports supplies food-grade sago and tapioca starch with excellent texture and shelf life. Clear communication and reliable delivery throughout.

comment: Kodai Global Exports supplies international-standard sago and tapioca starch. On-time delivery and professional handling make them a trusted partner.

comment: Kodai Global Exports provides sago and starch products that meet our quality standards. Packaging and delivery are always dependable.
